post.subject: I hate smoking!
post.body: Why is it that every time ive had a cigarette when ive been drinking in the last couple of weeks ive almost gagged - like, really almost been sick! I dont like it. Damn I fuckin hate smoking!!

comments.body: just think about it this way...the sooner you quit, the healthier you'll be and the more money you can save for a return trip to the states...that should be reason enough for you to get rid of that nasty habit!
